title: navarretia mellita
intro: Navarretia mellita, also known as the Sandshowy or Bee Bells, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Navarretia mellita include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the prevention of infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections.
